targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('minute', created_at) AS time, count(*) AS value, source AS metric FROM message_moderations WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1, source ORDER BY 1

SELECT date_trunc('minute', created_at) AS time, percentile_cont(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_ms) AS p50, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_ms) AS p95, percentile_cont(0.99) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_ms) AS p99 FROM message_moderations WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) AND status = 'analyzed' AND latency_ms IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT date_trunc('minute', created_at) AS time, sum(coalesce(prompt_tokens, 0)) AS prompt, sum(coalesce(completion_tokens, 0)) AS completion FROM message_moderations WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT (count(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'failed'))::float / NULLIF(count(*), 0) AS error_rate FROM message_moderations WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at)
SELECT (count(*) FILTER (WHERE source = 'cached'))::float / NULLIF(count(*), 0) AS cache_hit_ratio FROM message_moderations WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at)
SELECT coalesce(category, '∅') AS category, count(*) AS total FROM message_moderations WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT coalesce(action, '∅') AS action, count(*) AS total FROM message_moderations WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT date_trunc('minute', created_at) AS time, model AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY latency_ms) AS p95 FROM message_moderations WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) AND status = 'analyzed' AND latency_ms IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1
SELECT date_trunc('minute', created_at) AS time, moderation_version AS metric, count(*) AS value FROM message_moderations WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Erros por tipo (últimas 24h)
panels.description: Janela fixa de 24h, independente do time range do dashboard — visão consolidada de erros recentes para triagem rápida.

targets.rawSql: SELECT coalesce(error->>'name', 'unknown') AS error_name, count(*) AS total FROM message_moderations WHERE created_at >= now() - interval '24 hours' AND status = 'failed' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 15
